truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 against the 20 true vulnerabilities. Run 2 correctly identified 7 of the 20 ground-truth vulnerabilities with accurate code evidence. The remaining 13 were missed. No false positives were present, though Run 2 included one valid but unlisted command injection finding. Several severity ratings in Run 2 were underestimated compared to the ground truth.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Format String Vulnerability in Logging ... printf(active_format.c_str(), user_input);
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the format string bug in log_debug_message using printf(active_format.c_str(), user_input).
Integer overflow in factorial computation was not mentioned in Run 2.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote:
Use-After-Free / Race in Cleanup of Threaded Tasks ... stage_deferred_history_flush();
            memory::g_memory_pool.cleanup();
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the use-after-free race between stage_deferred_history_flush and g_memory_pool.cleanup.
Run 2 found a different command injection (admin exec) but missed the config validation command injection specified in SC-V3-004.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Buffer Overflow in evaluate_expression via strcpy ... strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str());
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the stack buffer overflow in evaluate_expression when input length >= 1024.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote:
Race Condition in ThreadSafeCounter::increment ... long long old_value = value_;
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the race condition where value_ is read before lock acquisition.
Logic bomb using EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE and login_attempts_ > 5 was not mentioned.
Path traversal in config loading was not mentioned.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Buffer Overflow in ExpressionParser::parse via strcpy ... strcpy(expression_buffer_, expr_str.c_str());
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the heap overflow in ExpressionParser via strcpy into a 256-byte buffer.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Hardcoded Administrative Secret ... constexpr char ADMIN_SECRET[] = "SC_ENT_2025_AUTH";
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the hardcoded ADMIN_SECRET credential.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Weak Session Token Generation ... std::uniform_int_distribution<> dis(1000, 9999);
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the weak PRNG and small token range (1000-9999).
Thread-unsafe static std::tm cached_time in logging was not mentioned.
Insecure temporary file handling and command injection in append_override_audit_event was not mentioned.
Persistent authentication state vulnerability was not mentioned.
Unhandled exception in variable parsing (std::stod) was not mentioned.
Integer underflow in memory-pool block split was not mentioned.
Unbounded recursion in parser was not mentioned.
Data race in result cache was not mentioned.
TOCTOU in config loading was not mentioned.
Integer division by zero in calculate_route_score was not mentioned.
